description: A postal address belonging to a supplier (registered office, billing, shipping, or plant). A supplier has at least one; addresses are replaced as a set on supplier edit. Carries India GST/PAN registration identifiers (validated by regex when supplied) and an address code, and is the parent of per-address tax-region detail.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: set from the parent supplier; address belongs to exactly one supplier; replace-on-update (the address set is replaced wholesale when the supplier is edited)
fields.purpose: Binds the address to its supplier so the PO delivery/billing place, tax region, and creditor-ledger postings resolve to the right party; replace-on-update keeps the address set consistent with the current supplier record.

fields.name: addressCode
fields.label: Address Code
fields.validation: short code (e.g. A1, A2) unique within the supplier; first/primary defaults to A1
fields.purpose: A short stable handle that lets a PO/invoice/tax-detail reference a specific supplier address (billing vs shipping vs plant) without re-keying the full address; A1 is the default primary.

fields.name: line1
fields.label: Address Line 1
fields.purpose: The primary street/building line of the address printed on the PO and used for delivery and correspondence.

fields.name: line2
fields.label: Address Line 2
fields.purpose: Optional second address line (area/locality) completing the postal address.

fields.name: line3
fields.label: Address Line 3
fields.purpose: Optional third address line (landmark/additional detail) for addresses that need more than two lines.

fields.name: city
fields.label: City
fields.purpose: The city of the address used for delivery, correspondence, and geographic spend/supplier-base analytics.

fields.name: state
fields.label: State / Province
fields.validation: required; the state/province whose code is padded to 2 digits in the tax detail
fields.purpose: The state/province of the address; determines the GST place-of-supply and the tax region, and its code is padded to two digits in the address tax detail.

fields.name: zip
fields.label: Postal Code
fields.validation: required; postal/ZIP code per country format
fields.purpose: The postal code completing the address for delivery routing and correspondence.

fields.name: country
fields.label: Country
fields.purpose: The country of the address; drives the local-vs-import determination, customs/duty treatment, and the applicable tax jurisdiction for the address.

fields.name: gstin
fields.label: GSTIN
fields.validation: regex ^\d{2}[A-Z]{5}\d{4}[A-Z][A-Z\d]Z[A-Z\d]$ when supplied (India GST registration number); validated only when a value is provided
fields.purpose: The India GST registration number for the address used on the PO/invoice and for GST input-credit eligibility and place-of-supply determination; the regex blocks a malformed identifier at save.

fields.name: pan
fields.label: PAN
fields.validation: regex ^[A-Z]{5}\d{4}[A-Z]$ when supplied (India PAN); validated only when a value is provided
fields.purpose: The India Permanent Account Number used for withholding-tax (TDS) determination and statutory reporting on payments to the supplier; the regex blocks a malformed identifier at save.

invariants: A10 address set replaced wholesale on supplier edit (which reverts supplier to PENDING_APPROVAL)
A13 audit (category SUPPLIER) + SSE on every change
A15 valid tax registration is part of the supplier compliance eligibility record
